turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Hi, I’m calling about booking an appointment for some ongoing right-knee pain I’ve got.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: This call may be recorded for quality and training purposes.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Sure, no problem.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Thanks for calling Pivot Point Orthopaedics.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Oh, no, I’m actually just following up on my appointment. Can I go ahead and book that?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: part of pretty good AI. Am I speaking with Alex?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Sure, it’s August 4th, 2000.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Can you please provide your date of birth?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Sure, it's Richard Feynman.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: I'll need your full name along with your date of birth to look up your information. Could you please provide your first and last name?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Thanks for clarifying.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, that’s correct.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: I see this number is linked to Richard.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yes, that’s me. Great, let’s go ahead and book it.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Is that you? If so, I can help you book your appointment now.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: No, I think I need the first appointment, for the right-knee pain.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Are you looking to schedule a follow-up consultation for your next visit?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Sure, now

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Thanks for confirming.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: I'm open to the first available, as long as it’s soon.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Do you have a specific provider you'd like to see or are you open to the first available?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, that’d be great, please check the soonest one after that.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: There aren't any openings for a new patient consultation in the next week. Would you like me to check for the soonest available appointment after that?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: The soonest openings are on Thursday, July 9th with Doogie Houser.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: I have 11.15 a.m., 12 p.m., or 12.45 p.m. available.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: I think 11:15 a.m. would be best.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Would any of these work for you?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Your appointment is set for Thursday, July 9th at 1115 a.m.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: with Dr. Dougie Hauser at Pivot Point Orthopedics.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Please bring your photo ID, insurance card, a list of your current medications, and any imaging discs you have.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: No, that’s all for now—thanks so much!

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Is there anything else you need help with?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: You're all set for your appointment.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Nope

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: if you need anything else.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Just give us a call.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Thanks, you too!

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Have a great day!
